creator: calle.madestrand@norrgarden.se
text:
ports/16308 was lacking the mention of BitchX in the subject
and synopsis, not sure if this causes too much trouble but I thought it might. 
You may close it.

Fix: remove file /usr/ports/irc/bitchx/patches/patch-ab
remove file /usr/ports/irc/bitchx/patches/patch-ac
remove file /usr/ports/irc/bitchx/patches/patch-af
add file /usr/ports/irc/bitchx/patches/patch-aa
